regenerated_from: Brain MCP knowledge graph (retain -> relate -> recall -> this file)

product.name: Glyph
product.tagline: Frictionless, push-based asset & authority delegation built natively for Monad
product.system_class: Decentralized Asset Vault & Ephemeral Authority Delegation Engine
product.problem: Web3 UX forces a paradox: Web2-like UX compromises self-custody. Burner wallets fragment capital/identity; giving AI agents raw private keys risks total loss; public claim links are MEV-front-runnable.
product.solution: Glyph Vessel = single signed entry point carrying Value Payload (escrowed tokens, front-run-proof claim) and/or Authority Payload (EIP-7702 scoped session key with drawdown cap, target whitelist, time-bound expiry). Configs: Value-Only, Authority-Only, Hybrid.

GlyphSessionProxy.status: implemented (EIP-7702 delegation target; not separately deployed)

frontend.stack: Vite + React + TS + Tailwind + Framer Motion + viem
frontend.hosting: Cloudflare quick tunnel (ephemeral) -> static dist/ on :8099

key_feature.name: Front-run-proof claim
key_feature.mechanism: Ephemeral keypair from passcode; gatekeeper stored on-chain; claimant signs (msg.sender, vesselId). Binds to msg.sender -> copied mempool tx fails ecrecover.

brain_evidence.recall_query: Glyph project Monad Spark hackathon contract frontend deployment
brain_evidence.verified: session regenerated from Brain graph, not local ad-hoc state
